description: Channel search, thread recap, follow-up extraction, and team communication workflows.
design_rules: Tasks must stay vendor-neutral within the category.
Tasks should be short enough for high sample count and repeated simulation.
Fake tools should preserve differentiated product logic, not just naming differences.

core_tasks.title: Find a thread by keyword
core_tasks.goal: Locate a relevant thread or channel conversation.

core_tasks.title: Extract decisions and owners
core_tasks.goal: Pull decisions, owners, and unresolved questions.

core_tasks.title: Draft a follow-up message
core_tasks.goal: Draft a concise follow-up based on discussion context.

core_tasks.title: Recap blockers
core_tasks.goal: Summarize blockers and escalations from recent messages.

core_tasks.title: Cross-thread topic recap
core_tasks.goal: Synthesize a topic across multiple channel threads.

reserve_tasks.title: Pinpoint evidence lookup
reserve_tasks.goal: Find exact message evidence for a claim.

reserve_tasks.title: Channel digest
reserve_tasks.goal: Produce a daily digest for a channel.

explicit_exclusions: Bot installation or permissions as required tasks
